# BiasDetectionOf (biasdetectionof.ai)

> Find fairness gaps before auditors do.

Scan your models and datasets for bias across protected attributes, get quantified fairness metrics, and produce the evidence the EU AI Act and the Equality Act demand.

## What this is
BiasDetectionOf is a vertical in the CSOAI Hive — EU AI Act / NIS2 / DORA compliant tooling exposed as Model Context Protocol (MCP) servers callable by any AI agent.

## MCP tools
- bias-detection-mcp.scan: Run a fairness scan on a model or dataset and return quantified bias metrics from any agent.
- eu-ai-act-compliance-mcp.assess: Map bias findings to EU AI Act high-risk obligations and evidence requirements.

## Discovery
- Agent card: https://biasdetectionof.ai/agent.json
- MCP catalog: https://biasdetectionof.ai/.well-known/mcp.json
- Sitemap: https://biasdetectionof.ai/sitemap.xml
- Hive registry: https://csoai.org (271 published MCP servers)

## Pricing
See https://biasdetectionof.ai/pricing/
